name: 2. 중학 수동태 200
description: be + p.p. 시제별, 조동사+수동태, by 외 전치사(be interested in 등), 의문사 수동태, 부정·의문 예문 200개 (중학 수준)

words.w: The cake is made by my mom.
words.m: [단순 수동태] 그 케이크는 엄마가 만드신다. (S + be + p.p. + by)

words.w: This book is written by him.
words.m: [단순 수동태] 이 책은 그에 의해 쓰였다.

words.w: The room is cleaned every day.
Cars are made in the factory.
The letter is read by her.
words.m: [단순 수동태] 그 편지는 그녀에 의해 읽힌다.
[단순 수동태] 그 건물은 하얗게 칠해져 있다.

words.w: The song is loved by many.
words.m: [단순 수동태] 그 노래는 많은 이들에게 사랑받는다.

words.w: The story is told every night.
words.m: [단순 수동태] 그 이야기는 매일 밤 전해진다.

words.w: The letters are sent by mail.
This dress is worn by her.
The school is run by her.
The test is graded by teachers.
The food is served at noon.

words.m: [단순 수동태] 그 게임은 전 세계에서 플레이된다.
[단순 수동태] 그 도로는 지금 수리되고 있다.

words.w: The movie is directed by him.
The mail is delivered at noon.
These toys are made in Korea.
The streets are cleaned at night.
The mail is sorted by hand.
The show is watched by millions.
words.m: [단순 수동태] 그 쇼는 수백만 명이 본다.

words.w: The car is washed by John.
The doors are locked at night.
Tea is drunk in many countries.
My shoes are polished every day.
The dishes are washed after dinner.
The garbage is collected on Fridays.
The mail is delivered once a day.
The flowers are watered every morning.
These products are imported from Japan.
The cake is cut into eight pieces.
The tree is trimmed twice a year.
The trash is taken out at night.
The cake was eaten by them.
The window was broken by a ball.
The bridge was built 50 years ago.
He was caught by the police.
The room was cleaned this morning.
The car was repaired last week.
My wallet was stolen at the station.
The tree was planted long ago.
The email was sent last night.
She was hit by a car.
The cake was made by my sister.
The photos were taken in Paris.
The building was destroyed in the fire.
The work will be done by Friday.
words.m: [수동태-미래·진행·완료] 일은 금요일까지 끝날 것이다. (will be p.p.)

words.w: A new school will be built here.
The results will be announced soon.
Dinner will be served at seven.
The prize will be given tomorrow.
The room will be cleaned later.
The book is going to be published.
words.m: [수동태-미래·진행·완료] 그 책은 출판될 예정이다. (be going to be p.p.)

words.w: The car is going to be repaired.
The guests will be welcomed warmly.
The plan will be reviewed later.

words.m: [수동태-미래·진행·완료] 그 집은 페인트칠되고 있다. (is being p.p., 진행 수동)

words.w: A new museum is being built.

words.m: [수동태-미래·진행·완료] 그 차는 세차되고 있었다. (was being p.p.)

words.w: The letter is being written now.
The trees are being cut down.

words.m: [수동태-미래·진행·완료] 일이 끝났다. (has been p.p., 완료 수동)
[수동태-미래·진행·완료] 문은 잠겨 있었다. (had been p.p., 과거완료 수동)
[조동사+수동태] 이것은 쉽게 될 수 있다. (can be p.p.)

words.w: The work must be finished today.
words.m: [조동사+수동태] 일은 오늘 끝내야 한다. (must be p.p.)
[조동사+수동태] 문은 닫혀 있어야 한다. (should be p.p.)
[조동사+수동태] 음식이 곧 제공될지도 모른다. (may be p.p.)
[조동사+수동태] 그 편지는 분실되었을지도 모른다. (might be p.p.)

words.w: The package can be delivered tomorrow.
The song can be heard everywhere.
words.m: [조동사+수동태] 그 노래는 어디서나 들릴 수 있다.

words.w: The pie should be served hot.
The cake isn't eaten by them.
The book wasn't written by him.
The room isn't cleaned every day.
Is this book written by him?

words.m: [by 외 전치사] 나는 음악에 관심이 있다. (be interested in)

words.w: The mountain is covered with snow.
words.m: [by 외 전치사] 산이 눈으로 덮여 있다. (be covered with)

words.w: I was surprised at the news.
words.m: [by 외 전치사] 그 소식에 놀랐다. (be surprised at)

words.w: She is pleased with the gift.
words.m: [by 외 전치사] 그녀는 선물에 기뻐한다. (be pleased with)

words.w: We are satisfied with the results.
words.m: [by 외 전치사] 우리는 결과에 만족한다. (be satisfied with)

words.w: The box is filled with toys.
words.m: [by 외 전치사] 상자가 장난감으로 가득 차 있다. (be filled with)

words.w: The park is crowded with people.
words.m: [by 외 전치사] 공원이 사람들로 붐빈다. (be crowded with)

words.w: He is known for his kindness.
words.m: [by 외 전치사] 그는 친절함으로 유명하다. (be known for)

words.w: She is known as a great writer.
words.m: [by 외 전치사] 그녀는 위대한 작가로 알려져 있다. (be known as)
[by 외 전치사] 톰은 모두에게 알려져 있다. (be known to)

words.w: The table is made of wood.
words.m: [by 외 전치사] 그 탁자는 나무로 만들어져 있다. (be made of, 재료 눈에 보임)
[by 외 전치사] 와인은 포도로 만들어진다. (be made from, 재료 변화)

words.w: I am tired of this game.
words.m: [by 외 전치사] 나는 이 게임에 질렸다. (be tired of)
[by 외 전치사] 그녀는 개를 무서워한다. (be scared of)

words.w: He was disappointed with the score.
words.m: [by 외 전치사] 그는 점수에 실망했다. (be disappointed with)
[by 외 전치사] 그들은 그를 걱정한다. (be worried about)

words.w: We are excited about the trip.
words.m: [by 외 전치사] 우리는 여행에 들떠 있다. (be excited about)

words.w: She is proud of her daughter.
words.m: [by 외 전치사] 그녀는 딸을 자랑스러워한다. (be proud of)

words.w: I was absorbed in the book.
words.m: [by 외 전치사] 나는 그 책에 몰두했다. (be absorbed in)

words.w: He is bored with his job.
words.m: [by 외 전치사] 그는 자기 일에 지루해한다. (be bored with)

words.w: She is ashamed of her mistake.
words.m: [by 외 전치사] 그녀는 자기 실수를 부끄러워한다. (be ashamed of)

words.w: The roads are covered with ice.
words.m: [by 외 전치사] 길이 얼음으로 덮여 있다. (be covered with)
[by 외 전치사] 치즈는 우유로 만들어진다. (be made from)
[by 외 전치사] 나는 역사에 관심이 있다. (be interested in)

words.w: The store is filled with customers.
words.m: [by 외 전치사] 가게가 손님으로 가득 차 있다. (be filled with)

words.w: She was surprised by the noise.
words.m: [by 외 전치사] 그녀는 그 소리에 놀랐다. (be surprised by)

words.w: We are pleased with the service.
words.m: [by 외 전치사] 우리는 그 서비스에 기뻐한다. (be pleased with)

words.w: He is known to the press.
words.m: [by 외 전치사] 그는 언론에 알려져 있다. (be known to)

words.w: I am proud of my team.
words.m: [by 외 전치사] 나는 우리 팀이 자랑스럽다. (be proud of)

words.w: She is worried about the test.
words.m: [by 외 전치사] 그녀는 시험을 걱정하고 있다. (be worried about)
[의문사 수동태] 그것은 무엇으로 만들어졌니? (What + be + 주어 + p.p.)

words.w: Who was the cake made by?

words.m: [의문사 수동태] 그것은 어디서 찾을 수 있니?
